nasb.text: There were two tenons for each board, fitted to one another; thus he did for all the boards of the tabernacle.

esv.text: Each frame had two tenons for fitting together. He did this for all the frames of the tabernacle.

cnv.text: 每塊板有兩個榫頭，彼此相連接；帳幕一切木板，他都這樣做。

ccb.text: 上面都有两个接榫，用来把木板连接在一起。圣幕的所有木板都这样做。
